name: Thai Chicken Wraps
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breasts, boneless, skinless (cut into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all sauce ingredients. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet until sizzling. Stir in chicken and ginger. Cook over medium-high heat until chicken is no longer pink (7 to 9 minutes). Add cabbage, carrots, red pepper, and onion; continue cooking until vegetables are crisply tender (5 to 7 minutes).
3. Meanwhile, in a quart saucepan, combine peanut butter, water, coconut, curry powder, and oil. Cook over medium-high heat until mixture is heated through (5 to 7 minutes). Remove from heat. Add rice and mix well.
4. At serving time, place 1 cup filling in the center of each warm tortilla. Fold two opposite edges of the tortilla toward the center of the filling. Roll up open end of tortilla toward the opposite edge. Place, seam-side down, on a microwave-safe plate.
5. Microwave sandwiches on high, turning or rearranging after half the time, until heated through (1 to 2 minutes). Repeat with remaining sandwiches. Serve wrap immediately with dipping sauce. Makes 6 sandwiches. Each sandwich: 730 calories; 38g fat.
